data.title: Fed's Williams Projects Inflation to Return to 2% Target by 2027
data.description: Federal Reserve official John Williams has projected that inflation will return to the central bank's 2% target by 2027. According to Jin10, Williams emphasized the importance of maintaining a steady approach to monetary policy to achieve this goal. He noted that while current inflation rates remain above the desired level, ongoing efforts to stabilize the economy are expected to gradually bring inflation down. Williams also highlighted the need for vigilance in monitoring economic indicators to ensure that the inflation trajectory aligns with the Fed's objectives.

data.title: Fed's Williams Expects Unemployment Rate to Stay Between 4.25%-4.5%
data.description: Federal Reserve official John Williams has projected that the unemployment rate will remain between 4.25% and 4.5%. According to Jin10, Williams emphasized the importance of maintaining this range to support economic stability. He noted that the current labor market conditions are conducive to achieving the Fed's broader economic goals. Williams' comments reflect ongoing assessments of employment trends and their implications for monetary policy.

data.title: Strategy Introduces Bitcoin-Per-Share Metric Reflecting Holdings
data.description: Strategy has introduced a new Bitcoin-per-share metric on its website, indicating 0.00205812 BTC for each MSTR share. According to NS3.AI, this figure is designed to illustrate the company's Bitcoin holdings in relation to its stock. Strategy currently holds a total of 780,897 BTC, as stated by Michael Saylor.

data.title: U.S. Forces Prepared to Resume Combat Operations, Says Defense Secretary
data.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Hagerthes announced that American forces are prepared to recommence combat operations at any moment. According to NS3.AI, Hagerthes received a briefing from U.S. Central Command Commander Brad Cooper earlier that day regarding the latest updates on Operation 'Epic Fury.' Hagerthes emphasized that the military is maintaining an 'unbreakable blockade mission.'

data.title: Federal Reserve's Williams: Inflation is expected to reach 2.75%-3% this year due to energy prices.
data.description: Federal Reserve's Williams: Inflation is expected to reach 2.75%-3% this year due to energy prices. Federal Reserve's Williams: GDP growth is projected to be 2%-2.5% in 2026. (Jinshi)

data.title: Decentralized Finance Faces Challenges Amid Industry Pressures
data.description:
Decentralized finance (DeFi), a sector previously known for its dynamism within the digital asset industry, is currently experiencing significant challenges. According to Bloomberg, the DeFi space is facing pressure from multiple angles, impacting its growth and stability. The sector, which was once hailed for its innovative approach to financial services, is now grappling with regulatory scrutiny, market volatility, and technological hurdles.

Regulatory bodies worldwide are increasingly focusing on DeFi platforms, raising concerns about compliance and security. This heightened attention has led to uncertainty within the industry, as platforms strive to navigate complex legal landscapes. Additionally, market volatility has further complicated the situation, with fluctuating asset values affecting investor confidence and participation. Technological challenges also persist, as DeFi platforms work to enhance security measures and improve user experience.

Despite these obstacles, proponents of decentralized finance remain optimistic about its potential to revolutionize traditional financial systems. They argue that DeFi's ability to offer transparent, accessible, and efficient financial services could drive long-term growth and adoption. However, the sector must address current challenges to realize this potential fully. As the digital asset industry continues to evolve, the future of decentralized finance will depend on its ability to adapt and innovate in response to these pressures.

data.title: Fed's Williams Projects 2026 GDP Growth at 2%-2.5%
data.description: The Federal Reserve's John Williams has projected that the GDP growth rate for 2026 will be between 2% and 2.5%. According to Jin10, Williams emphasized the importance of maintaining a balanced approach to monetary policy to support sustainable economic growth. He noted that while the economy is expected to grow steadily, potential challenges such as inflationary pressures and global economic uncertainties could impact this outlook. Williams also highlighted the need for vigilance in monitoring economic indicators to ensure that the growth trajectory remains on track.

data.title: Fed's Williams: Prolonged Shocks May Increase Inflation and Hinder Growth
data.description: Federal Reserve official John Williams has indicated that extended economic shocks could lead to higher inflation and suppress economic growth. According to Jin10, Williams emphasized the potential for these prolonged disruptions to create challenges for the economy, highlighting the importance of monitoring inflationary pressures and growth trajectories closely. The statement underscores the Fed's ongoing concerns about maintaining economic stability amid uncertain conditions.

data.title: IPPC Security Breach Exposes Personal and Medical Data of Over 133,000 Individuals
data.description: IPPC has reported a security incident that potentially exposed the personal and medical data of 133,862 individuals. According to NS3.AI, the pharmacy started notifying those affected on February 27th after conducting a review of the compromised files.

data.title: Riot Platforms Executive Resigns Amid AI Data Center Transition Challenges
data.description:
Riot Platforms, the largest Bitcoin mining company in North America, is facing significant challenges as it transitions to an AI data center. According to PANews, a senior executive has abruptly resigned, forfeiting stock valued at $18.7 million.

The company's shift towards AI data centers has encountered multiple obstacles, including power infrastructure modifications and technical standards. These challenges have led to a standstill in the project's progress.

The ambitious transformation has raised questions about the specific hurdles impeding its advancement.

data.title: U.S. Military Prepared to Resume Operations in Iranian Waters
data.description: The U.S. military is ready to resume operations in Iranian territorial and international waters, according to Odaily. Senior U.S. military official, General Kane, stated that enforcement actions will apply to all vessels entering or leaving Iranian ports. The United States will also monitor any ships attempting to provide support to Iran.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Expects Two More Rate Hikes from Reserve Bank of Australia
data.description: Goldman Sachs has revised its forecast, now anticipating that the Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) will implement two additional interest rate hikes. According to Jin10, this adjustment reflects a shift in the bank's economic outlook for Australia. The decision comes amid ongoing assessments of the country's economic conditions and inflationary pressures. The RBA's monetary policy adjustments are closely watched by investors and analysts, as they can significantly impact financial markets and economic growth. The timing and magnitude of these anticipated rate hikes remain a subject of interest for market participants.

data.title: Hyperbridge: The estimated damage from the vulnerability has been increased from $237,000 to $2.5 million, and some funds have been transferred to Binance.
data.description: Hyperbridge announced on its X platform that the losses from the Token Gateway vulnerability incident on April 13th have been revised from the initial estimate of $237,000 to approximately $2.5 million. The increase primarily stems from losses in incentive pools on Ethereum, Base, BNB Chain, and Arbitrum. The attackers extracted approximately 245 ETH from the relevant contracts and then bypassed the MMR proof verification mechanism by forging cross-chain messages, minting 1 billion bridged DOTs and selling them. Some of the stolen funds have been traced to Binance, and Hyperbridge is collaborating with Binance's compliance team and law enforcement agencies on the investigation. Polkadot's native DOT and Intent Gateway products are unaffected, while the Token Gateway and bridged DOT contracts on the four affected EVM chains remain suspended. The MMR verification logic patch is currently undergoing external auditing.

data.title: US Senior General Kane: Law Enforcement Will Be Conducted in Iranian Territorial Waters and International Waters
data.description: U.S. General Kane: The U.S. military is ready to resume operations. Enforcement will be carried out in Iranian territorial waters and international waters, with blockades applicable to all vessels entering or leaving Iranian ports. U.S. General Kane: The U.S. will track any vessels attempting to provide support to Iran. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Defense Secretary Warns Iran of Potential Military Action
data.description:
U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has announced that the United States is reinforcing its military capabilities with unprecedented strength. According to Foresight News, Hegseth stated that if Iran makes a strategic error and refuses to reach an agreement, the U.S. is prepared to resume military operations. He conveyed a clear message to Iran, emphasizing that the U.S. is closely monitoring their activities.

Hegseth highlighted that the U.S. is aware of Iran's military asset movements and noted that Iran is repairing launch devices damaged by bombings. He criticized Iran's claims of controlling the Strait of Hormuz, pointing out that Iran lacks a navy and that threatening commercial vessels is an act of piracy, not control.

Furthermore, Hegseth indicated that the U.S. is ready to target critical infrastructure, including power generation and the energy sector, if necessary.

data.title: BASED Token Surges with Significant Market Cap Increase
data.description: BASED token has experienced a notable increase, surpassing 0.14 USDT. According to Foresight News, its market capitalization has risen to $8.45 million, marking a 24-hour growth of 86.8%.

data.title: Galaxy Digital Urges SEC to Clarify Regulations on Tokenized Stocks
data.description: Galaxy Digital's research head, Alex Thorn, has highlighted the stance of traditional finance groups, which are publicly endorsing cryptocurrency while advocating for stringent application of securities laws by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) concerning tokenized stocks traded via decentralized finance (DeFi) platforms and automated market makers (AMMs). According to NS3.AI, Galaxy Digital has submitted a letter to the SEC, asserting that AMMs should not be classified as exchanges and that liquidity providers should not be considered dealers.

data.title: ECB's Kazaks: Companies May Adjust Prices More Rapidly Due to Recent Inflation Experience
data.description: European Central Bank Governing Council member Martins Kazaks has indicated that businesses might begin adjusting their prices more swiftly than in the past, considering the recent experiences with inflation. According to Jin10, Kazaks highlighted that the inflationary pressures observed recently could lead to quicker price adjustments by companies, reflecting a shift in their pricing strategies. This observation comes amid ongoing discussions about inflation trends and their impact on the economy.

data.title: Following OpenAI's announcement of its first permanent office in London, Anthropic has also expanded its London operations.
data.description: Anthropic announced on Thursday that it is expanding its London operations with a new office space that can accommodate 800 people. This comes days after rival OpenAI announced plans to open its first permanent office in London. Anthropic stated that it already has over 200 employees working in London. Pip White, head of Anthropic's Europe, Middle East and North Africa region, said in the statement, "London is already one of our most important research and business hubs outside the US, and our expansion in the Knowledge Park provides space for our future growth." He added, "The UK brings together ambitious companies and institutions that understand the risks to AI security and has an excellent pool of AI talent – ​​we want to be the crossroads of it all." Earlier reports indicated that British officials attempted to recruit Anthropic after a dispute with the Pentagon over the use of its AI models. (Jinshi)

data.title: Paris Blockchain Week Enhances Security Amid Rising Crypto-Related Incidents in France
data.description: Paris Blockchain Week has increased security measures for its event this week, responding to a surge in crypto-related attacks in France, which have totaled 19 incidents in 2026. According to NS3.AI, the conference has implemented police-escorted buses to transport attendees to a dinner, aiming to ensure their safety. Jean-Didier Berger and Michael Amar reported that 466 members of the crypto industry have joined a priority emergency response platform, and authorities have arrested 230 individuals since January.
